rpcUrl.description: 0G Chain RPC endpoint. Galileo testnet: https://evmrpc-testnet.0g.ai. Aristotle mainnet: https://evmrpc.0g.ai.

indexerUrl.description: 0G Storage indexer endpoint. Galileo: https://indexer-storage-testnet-turbo.0g.ai. Mainnet: https://indexer-storage-turbo.0g.ai.

agenticIdAddress.description: Pre-deployed AgenticID contract address. Galileo: 0x2700F6A3e505402C9daB154C5c6ab9cAEC98EF1F (per ADR-08).

verifierAddress.description: Deployed MockTEEVerifier contract address (set after `pnpm hardhat run contracts/scripts/deploy-mock.ts --network 0g-testnet`).

verifyUrlBase.description: Base URL of the verifier dashboard (e.g. https://verify.example.com). Appended to the relative /verify/<chainId>/<tokenId> path returned by SessionAnchor.anchor().

chainId.description: EVM chainId for the verifyUrl. 16602 for Galileo testnet, 16661 for Aristotle mainnet. REQUIRED — no Galileo default to prevent silent mainnet-URL leaks on preview deploys.

agentId.description: 0x-prefixed 20-byte address bound to this agent. Used as both the iNFT recipient and the dataDescription identity in `exec-log:<sessionId>:<modelId>` entries.

modelId.description: Model identifier baked into ADR-08 dataDescription strings (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'). Bound at plugin-load time so individual sessions don't have to thread it.

privateKeyEnvVar.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the signer private key (default 'PRIVATE_KEY'). The plugin reads `process.env[<name>]` at session-end time so the key never sits in OpenClaw config files.
